title: stizolobium utile
intro: Stizolobium utile, also known as the pea flower, is a perennial vine native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, known for its medicinal and health benefits. The plant contains alkaloids with medicinal properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Stizolobium utile include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and improve overall health. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies, such as tinctures and salves.
